dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The agent maintained a 100% success rate for schema validation across all critical reasoning spans. The successful loading of governance rules in 'rules-context-loader' and subsequent validation in the 'alignment-engine' confirms strict adherence to defined architectural constraints.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: High depth of causal analysis evidenced by the processing of 55,634 tokens in the 'architecture-work-to-evolution-map' span. This exceeds the baseline performance of 54,385 tokens, indicating a more granular and comprehensive mapping of architectural state transitions.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The alignment engine effectively managed trade-offs, processing 30,990 tokens. Although slightly below the specific baseline trace of 31,181, it remains well above the historical benchmark of 30,688, demonstrating strong capabilities in surfacing and resolving architectural tensions.
